errors.server_starting: ⏱️ Seva na-amalite (30-60s). Biko gbalịa ọzọ n'oge na-adịghị anya.

errors.file_too_large: 📦 Faịlụ buru oke ibu. Biko jiri faịlụ na-erughị 10MB.

errors.server_error: 🔧 Njehie seva mere. Otu anyị amatala ya. Biko gbalịa ọzọ mgbe e mesịrị.

errors.text_too_long: Ederede dị ogologo. Biko gbochie na mkpụrụedemede 50,000.

earn.headline: Nweta ego ka ị na-agụ
earn.body: Gụọ akwụkwọ na akụkọ. Nweta isi ihe maka nkeji ọ bụla nke oge ịgụ akwụkwọ enyochara.

study.headline: Gbanwee usoro ọmụmụ gị ka ọ bụrụ ajụjụ
study.body: Bulite ihe ọmụmụ gị. AI anyị na-emepụta ajụjụ, kaadị ọsọ ọsọ, na ajụjụ ọmụmụ n'ime sekọnd ole na ole.

wallet.headline: Wepu ego ma ọ bụ nweta premium
wallet.body: Gbanwee isi ihe gị ka ọ bụrụ Naira site na Flutterwave, ma ọ bụ mepee premium maka ịgụ akwụkwọ na-enweghị mgbasa ozi na isi ihe × 2.

streak.headline: Gụọ kwa ụbọchị, nweta karịa
streak.body: Wuo streak ụbọchị 7. Mepee mgbakwunye isi ihe ogologo oge ị na-agụ akwụkwọ n'usoro.

premium.headline: Isi ihe × 2, enweghị mgbasa ozi
premium.body: Mepee premium maka ịgụ akwụkwọ na-enweghị mgbasa ozi, mee ka isi ihe gị mụbaa okpukpu abụọ, ma nweta ihe ọmụmụ AI na-akparaghị ókè.

subscription.title: Ndenye Aha
subscription.info: A na-ejikwa ndenye aha site na ụlọ ahịa ngwa gị. Mgbanwe na-arụ ọrụ ozugbo.
subscription.alert_message:
Iji jikwaa ndenye aha gị, gaa na ntọala ngwaọrụ gị:

Android: Google Play Store → Ndenye Aha
iOS: Settings → Apple ID → Ndenye Aha

book_detail.sessions_hint: Gụọ nkeji 1 → lee mgbasa ozi → mepee nke ọzọ
book_detail.locked_session: Nzukọ {{order}} akpọchiri. Rụchaa nzukọ gara aga ka ị mepee.

reader.end_label_reached: Nkeji 1 eruola — dị njikere mgbe ị dị njikere
reader.end_label_reading: Gaa n'ihu na-agụ — njedebe ga-emepe na 1 min
reader.ad_pre_body: Lee mgbasa ozi a ka ị mepee elekere ịgụ akwụkwọ. Ị ga-enweta isi ihe dabere n'ogologo oge ị na-agụ.
reader.ad_post_body: Lee mgbasa ozi a ka ị kpọchie isi ihe gị maka ịgụ a. Mafere ga-eme ka ị tụfuo ụgwọ ọrụ mana ọ ka ga-echekwa ọganihu gị.

sponsor_register.title: Bụrụ Onye Nkwado
sponsor_register.subtitle: Tinye ọrụ, rute ọtụtụ puku mmadụ, ma mee ka akara azụmahịa gị too
sponsor_register.display_name_placeholder: Aha gị ma ọ bụ aha akara azụmahịa
sponsor_register.info_text: Onye ọ bụla nwere ike ịbụ onye nkwado - ndị mmadụ, ndị na-emetụta, akara azụmahịa. Ọ dịghị ndebanye aha azụmahịa achọrọ.
sponsor_register.success_message: Rụchaa nnyocha KYC ka ị malite imepụta ọrụ.

sponsor_kyc.title: Nnyocha KYC
sponsor_kyc.why_kyc_text: Anyị na-enyocha ndị nkwado niile iji chebe ndị ọrụ ma nọgide na-enwe ntụkwasị obi. Naanị ID gị ka achọrọ - akwụkwọ azụmahịa bụ nhọrọ.
sponsor_kyc.business_reg_placeholder: Nọmba CAC ma ọ bụ RC (nhọrọ)
sponsor_kyc.success_message: Arịrịọ KYC gị nọ n'okpuru nlele. Anyị ga-eme ka ị mara n'ime awa 24.

task_complete.info_text: Bulite ihe akaebe doro anya na ị rụchara ọrụ ahụ. AI ga-enyocha nnyefe gị na-akpaghị aka.
task_complete.text_placeholder: Tinye koodu nkwenye, nzaghachi nyocha, ma ọ bụ ederede nyocha...
task_complete.submit_message: Ozugbo ị nyefere, a ga-enyocha ihe akaebe gị site na AI. Ị gaghị enwe ike ịgbanwe ya ọzọ.
task_complete.submitted_message: A na-enyocha nnyefe gị. Anyị ga-eme ka ị mara ozugbo anyị kwadoro.
